summary: Iteration 5 UI verification passed 100%. Language switcher (open/close/select/ESC/outside-click/localStorage persistence) works. Hero tagline blue rgb(0,71,255), Google review chip with 5 stars + 4.9/5 + 120+ Bewertungen present. Hero benefit ticks filled green rgb(37,211,102). Hero visual composite (img + 3 floating cards + momo-answer + MOMO badge) renders. Problems section is 3-col grid on desktop (rows share Y: 1578, 2111), each card has image above text and green number badge; card-01 green keyword 'unbeantwortete' color rgb(30,185,85). Card 07 present with 4 voice command items. Footer '© 2026 MOMO' without 'Swiss Made'. All 4 CTAs working. Mobile 390px: switcher visible/functional, cards stack, no horizontal overflow. 0 console errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 fully verified via Playwright at 1920 & 390 viewports. LanguageSwitcher persists to localStorage['pm_lang']. Problems 3-col grid, Card 07 climax composition confirmed.
